title: hemicarpha axillaris
intro: Hemicarpha axillaris, also known as the small-flowered spike-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hemicarpha axillaris include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Hemicarpha axillaris can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
